=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (5:24-5:41) TS377022: The `catch` callback in `Effect.tryPromise` returns the global `Error` type. Untagged errors merge together in the Effect error channel and lose type-level distinction; a tagged error preserves that distinction and can wrap the original error in a `cause` property. effect(globalErrorInEffectCatch)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalErrorInEffectCatch for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalErrorInEffectCatch for entire file"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable globalErrorInEffectCatch for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable globalErrorInEffectCatch for entire file" ===
skipped by default
